widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A

widgets.name: Location_ProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The producer assigned number of the location.

widgets.name: Location_Building_ProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The building number for the premises.  Used when more than one building exists at an individual location.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_AABCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Does applicant have a heating or processing boiler?".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_AABInspectionDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date of the last inspection.

widgets.name: OtherInsurance_InsurerFullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The insurer name on any other applicable insurance. As used here, this is the current carrier for boiler and machinery coverage.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_AADCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Any specialized equipment, such as medical equipment or other, valued over $100,000?".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_AnySpecializedEquipmentExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of an specialized equipment, such as medical equipment or other, valued over $100,000.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_AACCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is all equipment inspected annually and well maintained?".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_KACCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is there a swimming pool on the premises?".

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_ApprovedFenceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is surrounded by a fence that is an approved height.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_LimitedAccessIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there is limited access to the swimming pool.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_DivingBoardIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool has a diving board.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_SlideIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool has a slide.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_AboveGroundIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is above ground.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_InGroundIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is in the ground.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_LifeGuardIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there is life guard for the swimming pool.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_KADCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is the building under construction?".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_BuildingUnderConstructionExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether the building is under construction.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_AAGCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is there a playground on premises?".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PlaygroundOnPremisesExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether there is a playground on premises.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Wiring_AluminiumCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if aluminum wiring is used in the structure.

widgets.name: BuildingImprovement_WiringInstallationDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date the wiring was installed.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_AluminiumWireUseDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any aluminum wire used.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_AAFCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is developer or contractor a board member?".

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Question_AAECode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is a property manager employed?".

widgets.name: Construction_CoverageToWalls_BareIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates coverage applies to bare walls.

widgets.name: Construction_CoverageToWalls_FinishedIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates coverage applies to finished walls.

widgets.name: Alarm_Smoke_NoneIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there are no smoke detectors in each unit.

widgets.name: Alarm_Smoke_BatteryIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the smoke detector is battery operated.

widgets.name: Alarm_Smoke_WiredIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the smoke detector is wired.

widgets.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireDivisionCount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The number of fire divisions in the building.

widgets.name: BuildingFireProtection_FireDivisionUnitCount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The number of units within a fire division.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_OwnerOccupiedUnitCount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The number of units that are owner occupied.

widgets.name: Alarm_AlarmType_HoldUpIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a hold-up alarm.  A manual or semiautomatic control which can transmit an alarm in the event of a hold-up. As used here, complete this section in regards to the location and protection systems for this risk. Information on the classification of safes, vaults and alarm systems can be found in the Crime Section of the ISO Commercial Lines Manual.

widgets.name: Alarm_AlarmType_PremisesIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a premises alarm.  A sensing device installed on premises which transmits an alarm in the event of unauthorized entry. The Premises Extent must be completed for Premises Alarms.

widgets.name: Alarm_AlarmType_SafeIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is a safe / vault alarm.  A system that protects the safe or vault and is connected to an outside central station, gong or siren. The Extent of Protection for safe / vault must be completed.

widgets.name: Alarm_AlarmType_OtherIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm type is other than those listed.

widgets.name: Alarm_AlarmType_AlarmDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the type of alarm.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_LocalGongIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm sounds or appears outside the premises.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_WithKeysIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the alarm company, located off the insured's premises, has keys to the applicant's property.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_CentralStationIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the burglar alarm rings at an alarm company.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_PoliceConnectIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if alarms (hold-up and burglar) are transmitted to police headquarters rather than to a private control station

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_GradeCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The alarm system grade as described in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard (i.e., AA, A, BB, B, CC and C) which indicates the time required to respond to a signal from the alarm system.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentSafeVaultPartialIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the safe / vault is partial and covers around the door only.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentSafeVaultCompleteIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the safe / vault is complete and covers the sides, top walls, floor and ceiling.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesOneIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 1 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesTwoIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 2 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_ProtectionExtentPremisesThreeIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the extent of protection for the premises is protection grade 3 as defined in the Underwriters Laboratories (UL) standard.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_CertificateIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The Underwriters Laboratories or other testing organization Certificate Number, if applicable. Attach a copy of the certificate to the application.

widgets.name: Alarm_Burglar_CertificateExpirationDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The expiration date of the certificate.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: SafeVault_ManufacturerFullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The safe or vault manufacturer's name.

widgets.name: SafeVault_Label_ULIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. (UL).

widgets.name: SafeVault_Label_SMNAIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the rating is based on Safe Manufacturers National Association (SMNA).

widgets.name: SafeVault_ClassCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The construction classification representing the extent of burglary protection for this safe or vault. Use the classification from the Burglary label and not the Fire label located on the safe or vault. For industry definitions of the classifications, refer to the Commercial Lines Manual.

widgets.name: CrimeMoneyAndSecurities_MoneyOnPremisesAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The maximum amount of cash kept on the premises during normal business hours.

widgets.name: CrimeMoneyAndSecurities_MoneyWithMessengerAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The maximum amount of cash messengers are allowed to carry for the applicant.

widgets.name: CrimeMoneyAndSecurities_MoneyOvernightAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The maximum exposure amount for money overnight.

widgets.name: CrimeInformation_DepositFrequencyCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The frequency of deposits.

widgets.name: BuildingProtection_DoubleCylinderDoorLockCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the type of locks on the entry doors of the insured premises are double cylinder deadbolt door locks.

widgets.name: SafeVault_ConstructionDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The construction of the safe, vault or other receptacle (e.g., 4-inch steel door, with 12-inch reinforced stone walls).

widgets.name: BuildingSecurity_OtherProtectionDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other protective measures or devices (e.g., if windows have steel grates and are connected to an alarm). Indicate if the building has skylights and if windows are visible from the street.

widgets.name: BusinessOwnersLineOfBusiness_RemarkText_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of any additional information required for underwriting or rating the business owners line of business.  ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required.

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_Signature_A
widgets.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the authorized representative (e.g., producer, agent, broker, etc.) of the company(ies) listed on the document.  This is required in most states.

widgets.name: Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form.

widgets.name: Producer_StateLicenseIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The State License Number of the producer.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_Signature_A
widgets.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the applicant or named insured.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_SignatureDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date the form was signed by the applicant or named insured.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Producer_NationalIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The National Producer Number (NPN) as defined in the National Insurance Producer Registry (NIPR).  Note: The NPN is not the same as the producer state license number.
